subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Setup current shell to use a specific ruby version

options.description: Show version of rvm
When used with ruby selection, sets a default ruby for new shells
Enable debug mode
Force install, removes old install & source before install
Used with 'rvm list' to display 'most' available versions
Used with 'do' to print out a summary of the commands run
Custom configure options, comma separated, double quote args that need quoting, default
